prompt_text: Recommended customer success tools for customer success teams at mid-market and enterprise SaaS companies companies
response:
# Recommended Customer Success Tools

## **Core CS Platforms** (All-in-one solutions)
- **Gainsight** – Market leader; comprehensive CSM workspace, health scoring, analytics
- **Totango** – Strong in health scoring, customer journey mapping, and reporting
- **Planhat** – European leader; excellent for SMB to mid-market, intuitive UI
- **Vitally** – Growing platform; modern interface, good automation features
- **ChartMogul** – Strong for usage analytics and expansion revenue tracking

---

## **Communication & Engagement**
- **Slack integration** – Essential; most CSM tools now integrate natively
- **Outreach** – Sales-focused but used for CS cadence management
- **Sendoso** – Physical gift management for customer relationships
- **Drift** – Real-time messaging for support and engagement
- **Segment** – Customer data platform; enables targeted outreach

---

## **Analytics & Health Scoring**
- **Amplitude** – Product analytics; essential for understanding user behavior
- **Mixpanel** – Product usage analytics and feature adoption tracking
- **Pendo** – In-app guidance, analytics, and feedback collection
- **Looker / Tableau** – BI tools for custom CS dashboards
- **Montréal Analytics** – CS-specific metrics and benchmarking

---

## **Customer Feedback & NPS**
- **Delighted** – Simple NPS surveys and sentiment tracking
- **SurveySparrow** – Multi-channel feedback collection
- **Qualtrics** – Enterprise-grade experience management
- **Typeform** – Beautiful customer feedback forms
- **ProductBoard** – Feedback aggregation and product prioritization

---

## **Documentation & Knowledge Management**
- **Confluence** – Wiki-style documentation (Atlassian ecosystem)
- **Notion** – Flexible, collaborative workspace
- **Slite** – Lightweight team wiki
- **GitBook** – Modern documentation for technical products

---

## **Meeting & Training**
- **Gong** – Call recording, transcription, coaching (sales + CS)
- **Chorus** – Similar to Gong; real-time collaboration
- **Loom** – Async video communication and training
- **Vendr** – Virtual meeting preparation and insights

---

## **Project & Task Management**
- **Asana** – Flexible project management
- **Monday.com** – Visual, customizable workflows
- **Linear** – Developer-friendly for technical teams
- **Jira** – Best for tech/engineering alignment

---

## **Contract & Renewal Management**
- **Artemis** – Specialized for CS contract management
- **Apptio** – Renewal tracking and expansion revenue
- **NetSuite / Salesforce CPQ** – Enterprise procurement

---

## **Customer Data & Integration**
- **Segment** – CDP for unified customer data
- **mParticle** – Customer data platform
- **Zapier / Make** – Integration automation between tools
- **Stitch / Fivetran** – Data pipeline tools

---

## **Recommended Tech Stack** (For typical mid-market/enterprise)

**Tier 1 (Essential):**
- Gainsight or Totango (CS platform)
- Salesforce (CRM backbone)
- Amplitude or Mixpanel (product analytics)
- Slack (communication)

**Tier 2 (High-value):**
- Gong (call insights)
- Delighted (NPS)
- Notion (knowledge base)
- Asana (task management)

**Tier 3 (Nice-to-have):**
- Pendo (in-app guidance)
- Outreach (cadence management)
- SurveySparrow (feedback)

---

## **Selection Criteria by Company Stage**

| Stage | Priority | Recommended Approach |
|-------|----------|----------------------|
| **Early Growth (50-100 employees)** | Simplicity + Affordability | Totango/Planhat + Amplitude + Slack |
| **Mid-Market (100-500)** | Depth + Integration | Gainsight + Salesforce + Gong + Amplitude |
| **Enterprise (500+)** | Customization + Support | Gainsight + Salesforce + NetSuite + Gong + Tableau |

---

## **Pro Tips**
